title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
